name: @haneoka/sonolus-engine
description: Sonolus play, watch, preview, and tutorial engine for Our Notes charts

scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck:tools && sonolus-cli --build ./play/sonolus-cli.config.ts && sonolus-cli --build ./watch/sonolus-cli.config.ts && sonolus-cli --build ./preview/sonolus-cli.config.ts && sonolus-cli --build ./tutorial/sonolus-cli.config.ts && node ./scripts/copy-upstream-license.ts
